title: Mehao Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Mehao Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Arunachal Pradesh

overview.short: The Mehao wildlife sanctuary was declared with an aim to conserve the biodiversity around the Mehao Lake.
overview.description: The Mehao wildlife sanctuary was declared with an aim to conserve the biodiversity around the Mehao Lake. The sanctuary is gifted with virgin natural lush green forest and lakes. The sanctuary harbours some rare varieties of orchids. The altitude of the sanctuary varies from 900 to 3500 meters.

topPlaces.name: Mayodia Pass
topPlaces.description: Mayodia Pass is a mountain pass in the Dibang Valley district of Arunachal Pradesh, India. It is a popular tourist attraction due to the November to March winter snow fall which is heaviest in January and February.

topPlaces.name: Roing
topPlaces.description: Roing is the district headquarter of Lower Dibang Valley district in the Indian state of Arunachal Pradesh. It is the last major township at the north-eastern frontier of India.

items.note: Mayodia Pass is a mountain pass in the Dibang Valley district of Arunachal Pradesh, India. It is a popular tourist attraction due to the November to March winter snow fall which is heaviest in January and February.
Roing is the district headquarter of Lower Dibang Valley district in the Indian state of Arunachal Pradesh. It is the last major township at the north-eastern frontier of India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mehao Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mehao Wildlife Sanctuary is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mehao Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dibrugarh Airport (118 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (333 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mehao Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mehao Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mehao Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Mehao Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mehao Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mayodia Pass, Roing.
